backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Metadata file listing implemented AR features, associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing the purpose of various frontend AR feature files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark theme variables and global styling.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the AR face filter page.
frontend/src/features/ar/capture/capture: Exports canvas content as a timestamped PNG based on the active variant.
frontend/src/features/ar/components/Came: UI panel that displays user-friendly camera error messages and recovery guidance.
frontend/src/features/ar/components/Effe: Panel providing sliders and toggles to adjust AR effect intensities and reset settings.
frontend/src/features/ar/components/Lens: Displays current variant info plus a list of active add-ons and effects.
frontend/src/features/ar/effects/backgro: Applies selective background blur using segmentation masks and layered canvas rendering.
frontend/src/features/ar/effects/glow/Fa: Draws a soft radial glow around the face using landmark-based positioning and gradients.
frontend/src/features/ar/effects/makeup/: Implements skin smoothing, blush, lip gloss, and eye sparkle rendering using face landmarks on a canvas.
frontend/src/features/ar/effects/ornamen: Provides a simple smoothing function to interpolate ornament positions toward a target point.
Loads ornament images and draws them on face landmark positions with secondary motion smoothing.
frontend/src/features/ar/effects/particl: Generates and animates pastel sparkle particles around the face using random motion and gradients.
frontend/src/features/ar/hooks/useFaceLa: Loads MediaPipe's face landmarker and provides continuously updated face landmark data from a video feed.
frontend/src/features/ar/hooks/usePerson: Initializes MediaPipe person segmentation and outputs a category mask updated each frame.
frontend/src/features/ar/render/ArRender: Coordinates applying makeup, ornaments, glow, sparkles, background blur, and variant effects to a canvas frame.
frontend/src/features/ar/state/defaultSe: Exports default AR effect configuration values.
frontend/src/features/ar/state/useArSett: Manages AR settings state with update and reset helpers.
frontend/src/features/ar/variants/animeS: Implements an anime sparkle AR variant with glitter tears and randomly spawned heart/star particles drawn around the face.
frontend/src/features/ar/variants/bridal: Applies bridal-themed overlays by placing jasmine flower and temple jewelry images on specific facial landmarks.
frontend/src/features/ar/variants/festiv: Renders festival effects including a bindi, diya glow, and drifting golden shimmer particles around the user's face.
Defines variant types and configuration metadata such as names, descriptions, and add‑ons for AR looks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, stored identity loading, and client creation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains a placeholder module for future backend query hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets global styling, color variables, fonts, and Tailwind base layers for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/ArFaceFilterPage.tsx: Main AR face filter page handling camera setup, landmark detection, rendering loop, variant selection, and capture actions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom colors, typography, container queries, animations, and extended theme settings.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing goals, required assets, features, and architectural notes for building a natural beauty Snapchat Lens.
